title: Executive Room
description: Redefines modern boutique luxury. Featuring premium king-size bedding with sumptuous linens and refined decor, with high-quality furnishings and meticulous attention to detail.
bed_type: King-Size Bed or Executive Quad (4 Beds)

title: Family Room
description: The perfect sanctuary for family travelers, providing a warm, inviting atmosphere and an exceptionally spacious living area designed to relax, socialize, and spend quality time together.

title: Budget Room
description: Designed with comfort and practicality in mind. Featuring cozy beds and classic furnishings, these rooms provide a welcoming retreat for travelers looking for an affordable stay.

title: Standard Room
description: Designed with a peaceful and functional atmosphere, equipped with a work desk, mirror, and a spacious wardrobe providing ample storage for clothes and personal belongings.

title: Superior Room
description: Combines simplicity with contemporary styling. This setup features adaptive configurations perfect for friends, business cohorts, or family members looking for a refreshing hotel experience.
